articles.title: Trump'tan "İran'la anlaşma her an olabilir" yorumu
articles.title_tr: Trump'tan "İran'la anlaşma her an olabilir" yorumu
articles.summary: ABD Başkanı Donald Trump, dün iki ülke arasındaki tansiyonun yükselmesine rağmen İranlılarla görüşmelerin sürdüğünü belirterek, "Bu her an olabilir. Belki de olmaz, ama her an olabilir." dedi.

articles.title: Trump: Üç muhrip gemi de hasar görmedi ancak İranlı saldırganlara büyük zarar verildi
articles.title_tr: Trump: Üç muhrip gemi de hasar görmedi ancak İranlı saldırganlara büyük zarar verildi
articles.summary: ABD Başkanı Donald Trump, "Hürmüz Boğazı'ndan geçerek Umman Körfezi'ne doğru ilerlerken İran'ın herhangi bir tahrik olmadan saldırdığı" açıklanan donanma unsurlarına ilişkin, "Üç muhrip gemi de hasar görmedi ancak İranlı saldırganlara büyük zarar verildi." ifadesini kullandı.

articles.title: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 08 Mayıs 2026
articles.title_tr: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 08 Mayıs 2026
articles.summary: Son depremler... Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler.. 08 Mayıs 2026 deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu? Son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Yakınımdaki depremler nelerdir? Anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika canlı deprem Türkiye haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD deprem haberleri.. İstanbul'da deprem mi oldu? Ankara'da deprem mi oldu? İzmir'de deprem mi oldu? Hangi illerde deprem oldu ve hissedildi? Bugün deprem mi oldu? Deprem ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son hangi bölgede deprem oldu? Deprem haberleriyle ilgili en çok merak edilenlerin cevabı haberde..

articles.title: Scientists find natural compounds that hit COVID-19 from every angle
articles.title_tr: Scientists find natural compounds that hit COVID-19 from every angle
articles.summary: A little-known tree from Brazil’s Atlantic Forest may hold a surprising weapon against COVID-19. Researchers discovered that compounds called galloylquinic acids, extracted from its leaves, can attack SARS-CoV-2 on multiple fronts—blocking the virus from entering cells, disrupting its replication, and even dampening harmful inflammation. Unlike many antivirals that target just one part of the virus, these natural compounds act in several ways at once, potentially making it harder for resistance to develop.
articles.summary_tr: A little-known tree from Brazil’s Atlantic Forest may hold a surprising weapon against COVID-19. Researchers discovered that compounds called galloylquinic acids, extracted from its leaves, can attack SARS-CoV-2 on multiple fronts—blocking the virus from entering cells, disrupting its replication, and even dampening harmful inflammation. Unlike many antivirals that target just one part of the virus, these natural compounds act in several ways at once, potentially making it harder for resistance to develop.

Researchers discovered that compounds called galloylquinic acids, extracted from its leaves, can attack SARS-CoV-2 on multiple fronts—blocking the virus from entering cells, disrupting its replication, and even dampening harmful inflammation. Unlike many antivirals that target just one part of the virus, these natural compounds act in several ways at once, potentially making it harder for resistance
articles.long_summary_tr: A little-known tree from Brazil’s Atlantic Forest may hold a surprising weapon against COVID-19. Researchers discovered that compounds called galloylquinic acids, extracted from its leaves, can attack SARS-CoV-2 on multiple fronts—blocking the virus from entering cells, disrupting its replication, and even dampening harmful inflammation. Unlike many antivirals that target just one part of the virus, these natural compounds act in several ways at once, potentially making it harder for resistance

articles.title: Bursa SUR Yapı Marka AVM önünde çatışma
articles.title_tr: Bursa SUR Yapı Marka AVM önünde çatışma
articles.summary:
Bursa'da SUR Yapı Marka AVM önünde gece saatlerinde çatışma çıktı. Çatışmada yaralıların olduğu öğrenilirken, polis kaçan şüphelileri kovalamaca sonucu yakaladı.Bursa’da gece saatlerinde yaşanan silahlı çatışma paniğe neden oldu. Olay, Nilüfer ilçesinde bulunan SUR Yapı Marka AVM önünde meydana geldi.

AVM önünde karşılaşan iki grup arasında bilinmeyen bir neden çatışma çıktı. Çatışmada yaralıların olduğu öğrenilirken bölgeye çok sayıda polis ve sağlık ekibi sevk edildi.


















Bu gönderiyi Instagram'da gör


































Bursa Hakimiyet (@bursahakimiyetcomtr)'in paylaştığı bir gönderi




Yaralılar ambulans ile çevre hastanelere kaldırılırken, polis çatışma sonrası kaçan şüphelilerin peşine düştü.



KAFAFATMA'DA YAKALANDILAR

Saldırının ardından şüphelilerin bulunduğu 64 ES 469 plakalı siyah BMW marka araç, Karafatma mevkiine doğru kaçmaya başladı. Kovalamaca sırasında kontrolden çıkan araç, yol kenarında park halinde bulunan 16 BLU 157 plakalı otomobile çarptı.

Kaza sonrası araçtan inen 2 kişinin yakındaki diş hastanesi bahçesine doğru kaçtığı öğrenildi. Bölgeye sevk edilen çok sayıda polis ekibi kaçan şüphelilerin peşine düşerken, şahısların kısa süre içerisinde polis tarafından yakalandığı belirtildi.

articles.title: Eating eggs could cut Alzheimer’s risk by 27%
articles.title_tr: Eating eggs could cut Alzheimer’s risk by 27%
articles.summary: Eating eggs might do more than just start your day—it could help protect your brain. Researchers found that people 65 and older who eat eggs regularly have a significantly lower risk of developing Alzheimer’s disease, with daily or near-daily consumption linked to up to a 27% reduction. Even modest egg intake showed benefits, suggesting that small dietary changes could make a meaningful difference over time.
articles.summary_tr: Eating eggs might do more than just start your day—it could help protect your brain. Researchers found that people 65 and older who eat eggs regularly have a significantly lower risk of developing Alzheimer’s disease, with daily or near-daily consumption linked to up to a 27% reduction. Even modest egg intake showed benefits, suggesting that small dietary changes could make a meaningful difference over time.
articles.long_summary: Eating eggs might do more than just start your day—it could help protect your brain. Researchers found that people 65 and older who eat eggs regularly have a significantly lower risk of developing Alzheimer’s disease, with daily or near-daily consumption linked to up to a 27% reduction. Even modest egg intake showed benefits, suggesting that small dietary changes could make a meaningful difference over time.
articles.long_summary_tr: Eating eggs might do more than just start your day—it could help protect your brain. Researchers found that people 65 and older who eat eggs regularly have a significantly lower risk of developing Alzheimer’s disease, with daily or near-daily consumption linked to up to a 27% reduction. Even modest egg intake showed benefits, suggesting that small dietary changes could make a meaningful difference over time.

articles.summary: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey is set to be a star-studded retelling of Homer's epic poem, and we're here to keep track of all the cast and characters who will be helping tell that story, including Matt Damon as the title character, Odysseus.
articles.summary_tr: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey is set to be a star-studded retelling of Homer's epic poem, and we're here to keep track of all the cast and characters who will be helping tell that story, including Matt Damon as the title character, Odysseus.

articles.title: Webb space telescope finds a giant galaxy that doesn’t spin
articles.title_tr: Webb space telescope finds a giant galaxy that doesn’t spin
articles.summary: Astronomers using the James Webb Space Telescope have spotted something that shouldn’t exist—at least not so early in the universe. A massive galaxy, formed less than 2 billion years after the Big Bang, appears to have no rotation at all, a trait usually seen only in much older, evolved galaxies. This challenges current theories that young galaxies should still be spinning from their formation.
